summary.title: Documenting /story command in README
summary.body: I updated the README.md file by adding a Commands section that explains the `/story` command, which develops user stories for a prd.md document through a conversational interface. This was done to provide clear documentation of the available commands and their functionality.

diffs.before:
# claude-instructions
A collection of commands and prompts
diffs.after:
# claude-instructions
A collection of commands and prompts

## Commands

### `/story`

Develop user stories for a prd.md document. This command provides a conversational interface to help you expand an existing PRD (Product Requirements Document) by adding new feature user stories.

The `/story` command:
- Reads your existing `.claude/prd.md` file
- Guides you through a collaborative conversation to define new features
- Asks targeted questions about the feature's purpose, users, and goals
- Automatically generates properly formatted user stories
- Appends the new stories directly to your PRD's "Features" section

Perfect for iteratively building out your product requirements in a structured, user-centered way.
